# Sigma Shop Fronts

> Professional aluminium shopfront installation, roller shutters, security doors, and emergency repairs across the UK. Based in Oldbury, West Midlands.

## About

Sigma Shop Fronts is a Companies House registered shopfront installation company serving commercial premises across the UK. We specialise in aluminium shopfronts, roller shutters, security doors, automatic doors, bi-fold doors, fire doors, and 24/7 emergency callout services. Our team provides free site surveys and no-obligation quotes for all shopfront projects.

## Services

- [Aluminium Shopfronts](https://www.sigmashopfronts.com/services/aluminium-shopfronts): Thermally broken aluminium systems with toughened glazing, powder-coated in any RAL colour.
- [Roller Shutters](https://www.sigmashopfronts.com/services/roller-shutters): Steel and aluminium security shutters — manual, electric, or remote-controlled operation.
- [Security Doors](https://www.sigmashopfronts.com/services/security-doors): LPS 1175 rated steel and composite doors for maximum premises security.
- [Automatic Doors](https://www.sigmashopfronts.com/services/automatic-doors): Sliding, swing, and revolving entrance systems compliant with BS 7036.
- [Bi-Fold Doors](https://www.sigmashopfronts.com/services/bi-fold-doors): Commercial-grade aluminium folding door systems.
- [Fire Doors](https://www.sigmashopfronts.com/services/fire-doors): FD30, FD60, and FD90 certified fire-rated doorsets for commercial premises.
- [Shopfront Repairs](https://www.sigmashopfronts.com/services/shopfront-repairs): Same-day glass, frame, and mechanism repair services.
- [Emergency Callout](https://www.sigmashopfronts.com/services/emergency-callout): 24/7 rapid response boarding and emergency glazing across the UK.
- [Shutter Repair](https://www.sigmashopfronts.com/services/shutter-repair): Fast roller shutter repair and maintenance services.
- [Glass Replacement](https://www.sigmashopfronts.com/services/glass-replacement): Commercial shopfront glass replacement and reglazing.

## Service Areas

We cover London, Birmingham, Manchester, Leeds, Liverpool, Sheffield, Bristol, Leicester, Nottingham, Coventry, Glasgow, Edinburgh, Cardiff, Newcastle, and additional UK cities.
